response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform development; their work is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only brief C++ exposure in early roles, and no evidence of leading cloud compute platforms or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers as required.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across diverse domains
Active open-source contributor with demonstrable technical depth
Proven mentorship and workshop leadership in software practices
concerns: No evidence of 8+ years of C++ programming as required
Lacks documented experience in cloud compute platforms or distributed systems at scale
No leadership experience in cloud or DevOps engineering mentorship
